subject: math

production_standard.manifest_hub_exposure: All packages must appear through manifest/graph-driven discovery, not hardcoded placeholders.

supported_or_reusable_from_grades_1_2.notes: Grade 1-2 plans already rely on this renderer; extend labels/tick density for Grade 3 fractions and rounding.
Usable for whole-number and fraction comparison after fraction answer normalization is added.
Grade 2 identified hundreds/tens/ones extension; Grade 3 can reuse if 1,000 and rounding metadata are supported.
Needed again for Grade 3 place value.
Reusable for Grade 3 two-step problems with operation metadata.
Reusable for equation setup and two-step tracking.
Must be productionized for Grade 3 multiplication/division arrays.
Extend for elapsed-time prompts and timelines.
Extend to mass and volume contexts.
Reusable for equal partitions and fractions from shapes.

new_or_extended_renderers_needed.need: new or confirm graph-token renderer; shows group count, objects per group, and total.
new renderer for repeated-addition expressions aligned to multiplication.
new composite renderer connecting groups, arrays, repeated addition, and equation.
new renderer for equal sharing and equal groups, including no-remainder Grade 3 foundations.
new renderer for multiplication/division inverse relationships.
new renderer for facts within 100 and highlighted products.
new renderer or extend number_sequence for fact strategies.
new renderer/interaction for selecting operations in word problems.
new renderer for midpoint, nearest 10, and nearest 100 decisions.
new renderer for unit fractions, equivalence, and comparisons.
new renderer for equal parts and shape-based fractions.
new renderer connecting start time, jumps, and end time.
new renderer for counting square units and rectangular arrays.
new renderer for distance around figures.
new renderer for side lengths, area, and perimeter distinctions.
new renderer/interaction for sorting shapes by properties.

schema_updates_needed: Keep SkillPackage JSON as the source of truth and require generator mappings for the full Guided Mission sequence: Story, Lesson, Watch, Demo, Practice, Challenge, Checkpoint, Badge, Profile.
Require level_banks validation for every Grade 3 Math production package: four focused levels plus Mixed, each with question_count_required between 10 and 12 and a mastery threshold.

Document or enumerate Grade 3 Math visual_model values for all supported, planned, and new models used by this plan; the current schema leaves visual_model as a string, so runtime renderer registry coverage must be the enforcement point if enum validation is not added.

Add or map Grade 3 question_type values: model_interpretation, equation_entry, array_counting, fact_family_match, missing_number, sequence_build, timed_fluency, constructed_equation, two_step_response, operation_sort, strategy_explain, rounding_response, expanded_form, fraction_entry, partition_counting, elapsed_time, measurement_reading, graph_reading, data_interpretation, grid_counting, visual_selection, and attribute_sort.

Add item metadata for visual operands such as group_count, objects_per_group, rows, columns, divisor, dividend, quotient, start_time, elapsed_minutes, unit, shape_attributes, side_lengths, partitions, numerator, denominator, and acceptable_equivalent_forms.
Require manifest/graph/hub metadata for Grade 3 Math packages so discovery is manifest-driven and never created as hardcoded placeholder cards.
acceptable_answer_needs: Numeric answers must normalize words, digits, commas, and equations where the item permits them, e.g. 24, twenty-four, 6 x 4, and 4 x 6 for commutative multiplication contexts.
Multiplication and division answers must distinguish product, quotient, unknown factor, and equation-form responses; inverse facts should be accepted only when they answer the prompt.
Two-step word problems need final answer validation plus optional intermediate answer/equation validation so a correct final number with an invalid plan can be flagged for review where required.
Rounding answers must normalize nearest-ten and nearest-hundred forms and preserve the requested place; 300 is not acceptable for nearest 10 when 270 is required.

Fraction answers must normalize slash forms, words, equivalent forms when the prompt asks for equivalence, and comparison symbols/words; non-equivalent simplified answers must be rejected when exact representation is required.
Time answers must normalize elapsed minutes, hours/minutes, and clock times while preserving a.m./p.m. only when the prompt includes it.
Measurement and geometry answers must require correct units, including square units for area and linear units for perimeter, unless the prompt explicitly asks for a number only.
Graph and line-plot responses must preserve scale, fractional tick values, and category labels.

contractor_ready_backlog.title: Finalize Grade 3 Math schema/runtime contract
deliverables: Schema or registry mappings for all Grade 3 visual_model and question_type values
Practice Center validation for 4 focused levels plus Mixed
acceptance: All planned Grade 3 Math fields validate or have documented runtime mappings.
No package can pass with placeholder level banks or missing mission stages.

contractor_ready_backlog.title: Implement Grade 3 Math visual renderers
deliverables: Renderer coverage for every new renderer in this plan
No fallback placeholder UI for planned models
acceptance: Renderer registry covers all Grade 3 visual models.
Fixtures render multiplication, division, fractions, time, area/perimeter, and geometry examples.

contractor_ready_backlog.title: Build acceptable-answer normalization for Grade 3 Math
deliverables: Time, measurement, area, perimeter, and graph response normalizers
acceptance: Correct equivalent answers are accepted where intended.
Wrong units or wrong representation are rejected when prompt constraints require precision.

contractor_ready_backlog.title: Create production SkillPackage for G3M_MUL_001
deliverables: SkillPackage JSON with Guided Mission source content
Practice Center level_banks with 4 focused levels plus Mixed
acceptance: G3M_MUL_001 validates as a production SkillPackage.
Hub exposure is manifest-driven and contains no placeholder card.

production_gate_before_package_buildout: Confirm schema/runtime mappings for every Grade 3 Math question type and visual model.
Confirm renderer registry production support for all planned visual models.
Confirm acceptable-answer normalization for all Grade 3 Math response families.
Confirm manifest/graph/hub discovery for every future package.
Confirm each Skill Practice Center has four focused levels plus Mixed with 10-12 production questions each.
